CREATE TABLE test_least (str1 VARCHAR(10), str2 VARCHAR(10));
SELECT least(str1, str2) FROM test_least WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT least(str1, str2) FROM test_least WHERE str2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT least(SELECT str1 FROM test_least WHERE str2 = 'ab', 'ac');
SELECT least(str1, (SELECT str2 FROM test_least WHERE str1 = 'aa')) AS least_value FROM test_least;
SELECT least(str1, str2) AS min_str FROM test_least WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_least WHERE str1 < str2);
CREATE TABLE other_table (id INT, str_col VARCHAR(10));
SELECT least(t.str1, o.str_col) FROM test_least t JOIN other_table o ON t.str1 IS NOT NULL AND o.str_col IS NOT NULL;
